compound-interest.description: Builds a compound interest calculator with chart
compound-interest.prompt: Create compound interest calculator: inputs (principal, rate 1-20%, years 1-30, monthly contribution). Output: final balance, total interest, yearly table, growth chart. Use #0074FF. Dark theme.

depreciation.prompt: Create depreciation calculator: inputs (asset cost, salvage value, useful life 1-50 years). Output: annual depreciation, yearly book value table, decline chart. Dark theme.

roi-calculator.description: Builds an ROI calculator with benchmark comparison
roi-calculator.prompt: Create ROI calculator: inputs (initial investment, final value, holding period years). Output: ROI%, annualized ROI, comparison chart vs 10% benchmark. Dark theme.

loan-amortization.description: Builds a loan amortization schedule calculator
loan-amortization.prompt: Create loan amortization calculator: inputs (loan amount, annual rate, term years). Output: monthly payment, total interest, full amortization table, principal vs interest pie chart. Dark theme.

build-finance-suite.description: Builds the complete financial dashboard with all calculators
build-finance-suite.prompt: Create a financial calculator dashboard with tab navigation. Each tab contains one calculator: Compound Interest, Depreciation, ROI, Loan Amortization. Use @compound-interest, @depreciation, @roi-calculator, @loan-amortization skills. Dark theme with #0074FF. Single HTML file.
